title: TaCZ:SF LesRaisins Armor Pack
description: Equips TaCZ:SF swat agents with armors from LesRaisins Armor
body:
# TaCZ:SF LesRaisins Armor Pack

Small datapack adding armors from [LesRaisins Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/lesraisins-armor) to loottables of [TaCZ: Special Forces](https://modrinth.com/mod/tacz-special-forces) swat agents.
